description_long: This is a standard claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a long, ergonomically designed handle. The head is made of steel, with one side forming a flat striking face and the other side shaped into a curved claw for nail removal. The handle is primarily red and black, constructed from a composite material with a rubberized, textured grip for enhanced comfort and slip resistance. The hammer shows a seamless integration between the head and handle, with a visible label or sticker on the handle. The overall design is practical and durable, suitable for a variety of construction or repair tasks in urban environments.
description: A red and black claw hammer with a steel head and ergonomic, rubberized handle. Features a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Top-down view highlighting the metallic head and the curvature of the claw.
description_view_1: Side view showing the full length of the handle and the profile of the hammer head and claw.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the ergonomic handle and the connection between the handle and head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the label on the handle and the full shape of the claw and striking face.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handle made of composite material with a black and red rubberized, textured grip for slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Steel claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw for nail removal on the other.
